basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology, Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology, Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of MANIT Bhopal. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MANIT Bhopal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in any branch of science with specialization in Computer Science or a related field, minimum 55% marks
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in any branch of science with specialization in Computer Science or a related field, securing a minimum of 55% marks. Sound knowledge of AI/ML, proficiency in Python programming, data analytics, web scraping, and research-oriented computational tools. Strong research report writing and academic communication skills are desirable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MANIT Bhopal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MANIT Bhopal Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Assistant position at MANIT Bhopal is 07-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree in any branch of science with specialization in Computer Science or a related field, securing a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Research Assistant position at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview, which can be conducted in either online or offline mode.

faq.question: Q7. What are the desirable skills for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Desirable skills include sound knowledge of AI/ML, proficiency in Python programming, data analytics, web scraping, research-oriented computational tools, and strong research report writing and academic communication skills.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology, Bhopal.

faq.question: Q9. Where is MANIT Bhopal located?
faq.answer: MANIT Bhopal is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
